goals.objective: Execute the approved Baguette farm docs plan from the current chat. Scope is docs/contracts/package only: document Baguette device farm for Screenslop and Studio-facing boundaries; verify upstream/local Baguette farm facts before documenting; add docs/baguette-farm.md to package files; link it from docs/getting-started.md, docs/agent-playbook.md, skills/screenslop/SKILL.md; update standalone skill runtime reference; update architecture/commands/agent-integrations plus Studio boundary docs only; do not edit docs/roadmap.md; add minimal contract tests; run required verification; commit and push.
goals.evidence: Completed Baguette farm docs plan. Added docs/baguette-farm.md; linked from getting-started, agent playbook, skill, runtime reference, commands, integrations, architecture, repo-strategy, session handoff, and known limitations; package whitelist includes the doc; contract tests cover package inclusion and proof boundary. Verification passed: Baguette upstream/local probes, contracts 11/11, smoke:package, npm test 115/115, doctor, diff check, pack dry-run. Independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR. Sidecars found by cleanup dry-run but not deleted.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
